creator: tkroot@mediaone.net
text:
I originally put it in as a separate port because I was having trouble
downloading
it and thought that maybe the copywrite was changing to be more
specific. So just
updating the original port is fine with me.

Benchmarks sounds like a good place for it too. Since the old one is in
net, perhaps
it should stay there as well? I have no problem with it being in just
benchmarks.

Paul.
